title: Create and Additions
description: A small but high-quality modpack with the best vanilla+ mods and the Create mod.
body:
This modpack is inspired by Raspberry Flavored and Bliss, designed for those who want an improved vanilla experience without departing from the atmosphere of Minecraft. At the core is Create, offering advanced mechanisms, automation and incredible buildings, as well as the best vanilla+ mods, expanding the game world with new biomes, blocks and mechanics!

🔹 New biomes and environments 🌿 – Nature’s Spirit, Galosphere, Cinderscapes and End's Phantasm add picturesque forests, caves and underground wonders.

🔹 New bosses ⚔️ – BOMD and Ultris add epic battles that require tactics and preparation!

🔹 Changed progression 🛠️ – Eyes of Ender and enchantments are now obtained in a new way, making progression more interesting.

🔹 Expanded mechanics and decor 🏡 – Supplementaries bring interactive items, and Farmer’s Delight makes farming more in-depth.

🔹 Changed method of obtaining alloys 🔥 – now netherite and electrum are obtained by casting through Create: Molten Metals!

🔹 Create unique panoramas! 📸 – the ability to take panoramic screenshots and install them in the download menu, making the modpack even more personalized.

🔹 Draw in Minecraft! 🎨 – Joy of Painting allows you to draw directly in the game or import pixel images and hang them like paintings!

🔹 High-quality optimization and QoL mods ⚡

🔹 Built-in shaders ✨ 

Explore, build and automate with Create and Additions!

**In order for Integrated Stronghold and End Remastered to work correctly, also install this datapack**
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/integrated-stronghold-end-remastered-integration

Credits: xali's Enhanced Jungle Wood by xalixilax - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-enhanced-jungle-wood](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-enhanced-jungle-wood)

Panorama mod by SWDTeam - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/panorama](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/panorama)

Adjusted Acacia by careeoki - [https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/adjusted-acacia/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/adjusted-acacia/)
